name: PEACE
description: $PEACE is the ultimate symbol of unity on the Solana blockchain, born as a grassroots movement on pump.fun. Emerging as the direct cultural counter-narrative to $WAR on Bonk, this project represents a digital battle of Good versus Evil. While others seek conflict and cabal-driven manipulation, our community chooses harmony. Following a turbulent history with a compromised predecessor, this version of $PEACE was established to provide a clean, fair-launch standard free from high-percentage holders or malicious "CTO" fees. It is a 100% community-driven social experiment proving that, in the end, Peace always wins. We are building a culture that rejects the toxicity of PvP trading and embraces the power of the people. Make love, not war. Choose $PEACE on Solana.
